opinion.h4: ALLISON v. INDIANA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF INDIANA. No. 696. Decided March 27, 1961.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for certiorari, certiorari is denied.
FLORIDA EX REL. ISRAEL v. CANOVA ET AL., FLORIDA BOARD OF PHARMACY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF FLORIDA. No. 697. Decided March 27, 1961.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Robert H. Givens, Jr. for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
